title: Special Needs Financial Planning Services in Florida
shortDescription: Financial planners specializing in special needs planning including ABLE accounts, special needs trusts, guardianship, Medicaid planning, estate planning, and benefits preservation for families of children with disabilities.
seoDescription: Find financial planners in Florida who specialize in special needs planning — ABLE accounts, special needs trusts, guardianship, Medicaid planning, estate planning, and benefits preservation for families of children with autism and disabilities.
description: Special needs financial planning helps families of children with autism and disabilities secure their financial future while preserving eligibility for vital government benefits. Specialized financial planners understand the complex intersection of disability benefits, tax law, estate planning, and guardianship. They can help families establish ABLE accounts for tax-advantaged savings, create special needs trusts that protect assets without jeopardizing Medicaid or SSI eligibility, navigate guardianship and conservatorship options, and develop comprehensive estate plans that ensure lifelong care for their loved ones.
benefits: Preserves eligibility for Medicaid, SSI, and other benefits
Creates tax-advantaged savings through ABLE accounts
Establishes special needs trusts for long-term financial security
Develops estate plans ensuring lifelong care
Coordinates government benefits with private resources
whoCanBenefit: Families of children with autism or developmental disabilities
Parents planning for their child's long-term financial future
Families navigating Medicaid or SSI eligibility
Those needing guidance on special needs trusts or ABLE accounts
